summary: Typed text upload now uses an in-memory Blob/FileSource on web and avoids URL.createObjectURL. Native typed-text submit is explicitly blocked with user guidance until native temp-file support exists. Picked-file upload still uses the React Native uri/name/type FormData path.

tests.notes: OpenCode worker completed with the required model and ran its own tsc check. Hermes reviewed the diff before acceptance.
Hermes validation passed with no TypeScript output.
Expo web export passed; existing expo-av deprecation warning remains.
The go binary is not installed in this Hermes environment.

git.commit_message_suggestion: fix(ui): harden typed text upload compatibility

blockers: Go tests unavailable because go is not installed.
risks: No live backend/browser upload test was possible in this cron run; validation covered static compile/build and code review.
follow_up_suggestions: Exercise typed text upload in a browser against a running backend.
Add native temp-file support later if typed-text conversion should work on iOS/Android.

questions: Does the FileSource union preserve picked-file upload behavior while fixing web typed-text upload?
Is native typed-text guidance acceptable until temp-file support is implemented?
